The war is expanding.
For Israel (and America?) this is now an expanding, bloody two front war. Here is life in Israel on the northern front:

Video
@BillOReilly tonight on “CUOMO” at 8p/7C. Find NewsNation on your screen: NewsNationNow.com

Yesterday's poll showed a majority of people think the war in Iran is just getting started. President Trump claimed the war will be over "very soon" but would not commit to any future plans. Do you agree with this result?

Vote on today's poll 🗳️ at smerconish.com

I an open to all takes that make sense...either you learn what you  had wrong or you get additional confidence you are right :)


Man In The Middle with Rayme (@RaymonScannell)

I’m going be using vox pupuli in a sentence at least five times today honor the hard work you do as well as your awesome vocabulary. I went to Syracuse so I had to look it up (twice) Then I just asked myself: why is a smart guy like Chris following Axios? 😇



— https://nitter.net/RaymonScannell/status/203174755227443611

Agree? (though by commenting you may be admitting you are a loser according to this guy)


Glenn Kuehne (@GlennKuehne)

Considering that 35-40% of eligible voters don't even vote, and many people avoid posting social media comments to avoid alienating family, friends, and employers, social media political posts are by 'influencers/media', people who are self-employed, or losers with nada to lose.



— https://nitter.net/GlennKuehne/status/2031760608920572275#m

I am 51  years old, and this morning I woke up with my bladder. In the clinical vernacular of high-grade urothelial carcinoma, that qualifies as a small miracle of modern immunotherapy.

I am now six consecutive cystoscopies clear — cancer-free by every measure available to modern urology — thanks to a drug called #Anktiva, an IL-15 superagonist that, when combined with BCG, activates the body's own natural killer cells (NK) to hunt residual disease. It is, in the estimation of the physicians wh

Who is right...rogan or the polls that trump has like 90%+ support from maga on iran?


Forbes (@Forbes)

Joe Rogan said in a Tuesday episode of his podcast President Donald Trump’s supporters “feel betrayed” by the president’s war with Iran, calling the conflict “insane.” 

Read more about his latest break with Trump after backing him in the lead-up to the 2024 presidential election: forbes.com/sites/antoniopequ…
📸: Alex Trautwig via Getty Images




— https://nitter.net/Forbes/status/203171221

So why do most on media cover social media comments as vox populi?  Lazy? Milking clicks? Doing same as algorithm? Thoughts?


Axios (@axios)

Most Americans are too busy for social media, too normal for politics, too rational to tweet. They work, raise kids, coach Little League — and never post a word about any of it.

This isn't a small minority. It's a monstrous, if silent, majority. axios.com/2026/03/11/america…




— https://nitter.net/axios/status/2031687958189805930#m

It's the terminally online news junkies who are detached from the actual reality.

We've been manipulated by algorithms and politicians amplifying the worst of humanity. Our feeds and screens spread a twisted, inaccurate view of America.


Axios (@axios)

Most Americans are too busy for social media, too normal for politics, too rational to tweet. They work, raise kids, coach Little League — and never post a word about any of it.

This isn't a small minority. It's a monstrous, if silent, majorit

BREAKING: US jobs numbers have now been revised down in each of the last 13 months, by a total of -710,000 jobs.

This means employment was initially overstated by an average of ~55,000 jobs per month.

US job numbers were revised down by another -4,000 jobs in January and -65,000 in December.

This brings the December reading down to -17,000, marking the 5th contraction over the last 9 months.

Since January 2024, there have been downward revisions in 24 out of 25 months.

US labor market data

Call into Cuomo Mornings on @SIRIUSXM NOW to have your say. 

Call In - 866-967-6887

Here is the state of play on the war...are we close to an end?

Video

Comedian Max Amini joins me to talk about growing up between America and Iran, what people misunderstand about Persian culture, and the reality many Americans never see inside the country.

Join The Chris Cuomo Project on YouTube for ad-free episodes, early releases, exclusive access to Chris, and more: piped.video/i65EgU3H5hw

Video

Called critical thinking, tyro...your "pick a side" in a binary battle to the bottom is working out great


Stephen Gray: Emmy award winning producer (@RealStephenGray)

Go to bed bud. We “like no noise from you podcast thru the night we have to listen to u guys enough. Elon is out here tonight and a few other minds. You and Aoc and the Conway guy can have the days. You play the fence on every single thing. Gets old dude



— https://nitter.net/RealStephenGray/status/2031274498507342301#m

So it is ok because you support nothing better than shit? Got it. Hate to have you working with me


TheCoffeeOptimist (@CoffeeOptimist)

Don't pretend this is specific to any particular administration. You know very well it happens ALL the time, regardless of political persuasion.



— https://nitter.net/CoffeeOptimist/status/2031264516336423327#m

Before Citizens United, billionaires made up 0.3% of political spending in the US. 

Now, they make up 19%. Anyone else think that needs to change? nytimes.com/2026/03/09/us/bi…
Do we in America really know what Iranians want and what they may be owed from America?  piped.video/i65EgU3H5hw

Noblesse Oblige


The Wall Street Journal (@WSJ)

MacKenzie Scott’s more than $26 billion in charitable gifts have arrived without warning and have led to bolstered finances, scholarships and jobs. on.wsj.com/4ljjXAf




— https://nitter.net/WSJ/status/2031201598903324950#m

FFS


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Brian Kilmeade this morning to oil tanker captains: "If you want to diminish the Iranian threat, if you want to make sure this ends with complete Iran capitulation, show some guts and go through that Strait."

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2031022434640404862#m
